steps.title: Use the cylinder volume formula
steps.content:
The volume of a cylinder is $V=\pi r^2h$. Substitute $64\pi$ for the volume and $4$ for the height.
$$64\pi=\pi r^2(4)$$

steps.title: Solve for the positive radius
steps.content:
Divide by $4\pi$, then take the positive square root because a radius is positive.
$$r^2=\frac{64\pi}{4\pi}=16$$
$$r=4$$
The answer is A.
